arts.ttl: Hull City man tells team to relish opportunity and not shirk responsibility against Coventry City
arts.sum: Lincoln, who joined City on loan from Fenerbahce in January, believes there's bigger pressure in life than football, and that the Tigers players must enjoy the privilege that comes with playing the game, and the chance to make a difference to the club's fortunes between now and season's end. Three months ago I went through this and now I do it again, but no problem because this is my job, this is football and this is the life, I try to just enjoy the moment.

arts.ttl: Ruben Selles reflects on Hull City's progress since last Coventry City showdown
arts.sum: City's position at the bottom end of the is perilous, while Coventry boosted their play-off hopes with a last-gasp win over Portsmouth in midweek, and come full-time on Monday night, there will be just four chances left to claim points, two of which come over the Easter weekend kicking off on Friday. Since then, they've gone on to register eight wins, collecting 28 points along the way, and given their difficult predicament, they'll be hoping that total is 31 come 10pm on Monday night.
